raw.subject: Your Richmond page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the music playlist you've curated on your Facebook page! 'Paint The Town Red' is such a great choice to set the tone for April. It's clear you're all about creating a welcoming and beautiful environment for your clients.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet - as a nail studio, I imagine you get a lot of walk-in traffic, but potential clients might be searching online and then missing out on booking an appointment with you.

I took a closer look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I was inspired to sketch out a simple idea for a homepage that showcases your services, beautiful work, and easy booking process. I included a services menu, a work gallery, and a clear call-to-action to book an appointment.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/q-nology-nail-studio-richmond/

I'd love to help you bring this idea to life with a simple, one-flat-project-fee solution.

Reply or give me a quick call to discuss further.
